'''K'inn''' was a [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] of the [[Silver Unifir]] on [[Pedducis Chorios]] who entered into a contract with [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]] for one and a half billion [[acre]]s on Pedducis for her and several thousand former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Independent Company of Settlers|settlers]] to colonize and live as they saw fit.

{{Char-stub}}
